recommendations.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
recommendations.overview: Josh and Buddy move from basketball to football in this first of several sequels to the original Air Bud.

recommendations.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
recommendations.overview: Air Bud finds that he has the uncanny ability to play volleyball.

recommendations.title: Gregory's Girl
recommendations.overview: A teenager falls hard for the female soccer player who has replaced him on the team and attempts to pursue her.

recommendations.title: Back of the Net
recommendations.overview: A new student at a soccer academy is determined to beat her rival's team in the national tournament.

recommendations.title: Lessons of a Dream
recommendations.overview: An English teacher brings soccer to a German school in the 19th Century.

recommendations.title: All the Freckles in the World
recommendations.overview: Teen comedy set in the school-year of 1994. José is the new kid on high-school, falling immediately for the popular and freckled Christina. Trying to impress her, he's going to unsuccessfully join the soccer try-outs. Is he shooting way out of his le

recommendations.title: Barfi!
recommendations.overview: The heartwarming tale of Barfi, a charming deaf-mute young man from 1970s Darjeeling, and two unalike women who can't help but fall for him.

recommendations.title: Shaolin Soccer
recommendations.overview: A young Shaolin follower reunites with his discouraged brothers to form a soccer team using their martial art skills to their advantage.

recommendations.title: Greener Grass
recommendations.overview: Suburban soccer moms find themselves constantly competing against each other in their personal lives as their kids settle their differences on the field.

recommendations.title: Mario
recommendations.overview: Two young gay soccer players get caught up between the politics of the game and the politics of love.
